insight_title: High Churn Risk Detected in Instagram Cohort
insight_text: Instagram users have 17.1% later-week retention, below the 26.2% overall rate. Consider a targeted re-engagement sequence.
Referral users convert to paid at 13.3x the Paid Ads rate and show 45.8% later-week retention. Referral spend per signup is about $4.17.
Only 52.5% of users who complete signup reach onboarding_completed. Review the onboarding flow for avoidable friction.

insight_title: Payment Started but Not Completed: 28.6% Abandonment
insight_text: 28.6% of users who fire payment_started do not reach payment_completed in the demo window. Test checkout reminders or clearer pricing.

insight_title: LinkedIn Volume is Low but Quality is High
insight_text: LinkedIn represents 8% of signed-up users and 56.2% of them activate. Consider testing a modest spend increase.
Paid Ads later-week retention is 10.9% versus 28.3% for Organic. Review targeting criteria and landing-page fit.
